name: Creamy Feta Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, combine garlic and cheeses.
Process until well combined.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, except olives, and process everything together.
3. Add the olives and gently mix with the cheeses, leaving some texture.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
5. Transfer to a crock and garnish with dill.
Serve with pita breads or cold shrimp. For an attractive presentation,
spread onto leaves of radicchio or form thin slices of prosciutto
into cone shapes. To use as a dip for vegetables, thin the mixture with yogurt.
The spread will keep refrigerated for 5 days.
